description: As the Zephyr is less than a kilometer from destruction, the team argues urgently over the morality and necessity of sacrificing Enoch. Without hesitation, Enoch himself removes the critical part from his body, fully understanding it will end his own existence but save his friends. Coulson and Daisy, deeply moved, stay behind to comfort Enoch as he faces his final moments.
location: Zephyr One (S.H.I.E.L.D. quinjet / mobile command plane)

transcript.line: Simmons. I need you to meet me in the LMD lab. In a moment, Enoch's gonna join you. Bring him.
Alright.
How far are we from the vortex?
Wha... We're less than one kilometer.
Okay. I need you to come with me.
Are you okay? You sounded...
Did you tell him yet?
No. I was about to.
Tell who what?
The vortex outside is about to kill us, but we are stuck in a time loop that is keeping us from breaking out.
So we need to act fast.
What do we need to do?
You were the one who told us. Enoch has something called an Electrochron Displacement Mechanism.
Yes. I understand.
I don't. How could I have told you? I don't even know what that is.
You do. You forgot, but we helped you remember.
Look, however they got there, if it's something we can use in the Time Drive, then I can figure it out.
But there's a risk. To Enoch.
Which is why we're here.
It is not an easy discussion to have.
No, there has to be another solution.
We have tried every possible angle.
You can't just expect Enoch to sacrifice...
I believe this is what you need.
Enoch.
What did you do?
What needed to be done, apparently.
Enoch, you'll die.
And the rest of you will live. I would like to think Fitz would do the same for me. I would like to think all of you would.
Oh, my. I do not feel at all well.
What do you think?
There's no time to think.
Deke.
I think I can do it. It's a good fit. Whosever idea this was, she knew what she was doing. Okay. Just need to make... one more adjustment.
Coulson, Daisy, Deke says he can get the drive working. We should be ready to jump out of the storm any minute. We'll let you know.
